phase: Phase 12 of ledger system buildout — first domain-tier ledger authored under DEC-2026-04-29-013
core_rule: If the project depends on an outside system, that dependency must be visible. Never the secret — always the location.
security_rule: Never store raw secrets in this ledger. Allowed: service name, env var name, expected location, owner, verification steps, expiry notes, what breaks if missing.

status_labels.active: wired and used by running code; failure has real consequences
status_labels.optional: wired and used but degradation is graceful
status_labels.planned: documented intent to wire but no active integration today
status_labels.not-in-use: available as a connector or in environment but not actually wired in this repo
status_labels.needs-verification: mentioned somewhere but not yet confirmed against code

anti_rule: Do not invent active services. If a service is available but not confirmed in the repo, mark it needs-verification or not-in-use. Hallucinated dependencies are worse than missing ones (PROB-2026-04-28-009).

connections.name: Close.com CRM
connections.purpose: Live CRM source for leads, contacts, activities (calls/SMS/email/WhatsApp), tasks, opportunities, ownership, statuses. Source-of-truth for client comms per SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md §3.1 rank 1.

credentials.notes: The 2026-04-28 verbatim backfill used a session-scoped key Jake never wrote down; future refreshes need the human to re-supply.

connections.failure_mode: no live comms import; no state sweep; no customer sends; stale Client Boxes; reply gate untrustable
verification: safe read-only API check (fetch known lead by ID; fetch recent activities for known lead)
NEVER test by sending a customer-facing message
connections.billing: Comeketo subscription; rate limits handled in comms_state_sweep

connections.name: GitHub Repository
connections.purpose: Durable source of truth for code, ledgers, configs, handoff memory per SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md §3.3 rank 1.

credentials.expected_location: macOS Keychain / SSH key / Git credential manager
credentials.notes: No GitHub API integration; all access via the git CLI.

connections.failure_mode: agents cannot read/write source of truth; continuity cannot be pushed; local/GitHub drift accumulates
fallback: local commit; push later when safe
connections.project_warning: Direct GitHub writes must always check git status first — the human may have unpushed local work (COMM-2026-04-28-004).

connections.name: Local server.py Runtime
connections.purpose: Single-file stdlib HTTP server backing the UI and proxying external services.
connections.failure_mode: pages cannot load dynamic data; /api/* fails; entire UI offline

connections.name: PiecesOS Memory Backend
connections.purpose: 39 MCP tools across Ask, full-text search, vector search, batch snapshot. Sole memory backend after Rodbot great trim.
connections.failure_mode: Activity screen empty; /api/pieces/* fails gracefully but visibly; sweeps unavailable

connections.name: ClickUp Workspace
connections.purpose: Task creation in team's ClickUp space when commits land via Delegations channel picker.
connections.failure_mode: ClickUp commits silently no-op; channel picker shows needs-setup or misconfigured
fallback: pick a different channel in Delegations picker

connections.name: Twilio (WhatsApp + SMS)
connections.purpose: Outbound WhatsApp and SMS to clients via Twilio (sandbox or paid).
connections.failure_mode: WhatsApp / SMS sends fail; channel picker shows needs-setup
verification: use TWILIO_TEST_* sandbox credentials — NEVER real customer
fallback: switch send target to email or Slack
connections.billing: per-message pricing — paid, watch the meter
connections.security_notes: Customer-facing; isolated approval card per DEC-2026-04-28-005.

connections.name: Slack Workspace
connections.status_caveat: token format issue per docs/connectors.md — current token is xapp- (app-level); need xoxb- (Bot User OAuth)
connections.purpose: DM Andre, post to team channels, alert on send failures or reply detection.
connections.failure_mode: Slack sends fail with token mismatch; channel picker shows misconfigured
verification: test post to a private channel only
fallback: surface alert in app's Activity screen instead
connections.open_problem_candidate: token-format issue should be recorded as PROB-2026-04-29-XXX if not already

connections.name: OpenAI API
connections.purpose: LLM completions for chat surface and reports.
connections.failure_mode: chat / reports fall back to error states
fallback: degrade to other providers if wired
connections.billing: per-token API billing — paid, watch the meter

connections.name: Cowork Runtime
connections.purpose: Runs future prompts / sessions on a schedule.
connections.failure_mode: scheduled sends do not fire; sweeps stall; Client Boxes go stale; automation looks dead
fallback: pause customer-facing sends until schedule re-verified
connections.security_notes: Per DEC-2026-04-28-005, every scheduled fire must respect guardrails.

connections.name: Claude Code Subprocess
connections.purpose: Delegation channel that runs an isolated claude -p subprocess for repo-aware work.
verification: server probes claude binary on startup → claude_code_available in /api/status
connections.failure_mode: delegations to claude_code target fail; channel shows needs-setup

connections.name: Browser Use Tool
connections.failure_mode: certain browser-driven workflows degrade; agent context narrower

connections.name: Google Calendar
connections.purpose: Real calendar truth for tasting / consultation appointments — replaces operator-typed dates.

connections.name: Email (Gmail / SMTP)
connections.purpose: Email channel that doesn't go through Close (e.g., quote PDFs, post-close handoff).

connections.name: Supabase Backend
connections.evidence_notes: no Supabase imports in server.py; no supabase references in *.jsx / *.js source. Cowork environment has Supabase MCP connector available but the repo does not use it.

connections.name: Google Drive
connections.evidence_notes: no Google Drive imports in code. Cowork environment has Google Drive MCP connector available but repo does not use it. Internal docs are mirrored into LEDGERS/, docs/, Auto/comeketo-inbox/references/ instead.

connections.name: Anthropic API (Direct)
connections.evidence_notes: no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env, no anthropic Python imports. Claude is reached via claude CLI subprocess (see claude_code), not via direct API.

failure_mode_map.first_check: last sweep timestamp + safe Close API read
/api/status for slack field; check token starts with xoxb-

failure_mode_map.fallback: switch to email or Slack channel

failure_mode_map.first_check: inspect recent run summaries; check last sweep timestamp
failure_mode_map.fallback: manual fire only; pause customer sends

safe_read_checks: Fetch known GitHub file via git
Fetch known Close lead by ID (read-only)
Read Slack workspace identity without posting
write_checks_authorization_required: Close note creation on test lead
ClickUp task creation in test list
never_use_as_connection_test: Changing real lead status in Close
Moving real tasks in production ClickUp lists
Pushing to main to test write access
verification_playbook.principle: Testing by causing damage is not testing.

billing_quota_watch.risk: workspace tier / app limits + token format issue

local_only: generated artifacts in CCAgentindex/_runs/, intelligence/, analytics/

triggers: new external service added to /.env or connectors.js
service moves between active / optional / planned / not-in-use
local-only dependency becomes important enough to need a recipe in repo
automation starts depending on a connection
Box's box.json subscribes[] references a service for first time

relationship_to_box_bus.manifest_field: box.json.subscribes[].ledger (when the ledger is a service-domain ledger like CLOSE_ACTIVITY or ANALYTICS_<name>)
relationship_to_box_bus.rule: A box.json cannot declare a dependency on a not-in-use or needs-verification service. Promote to active first (with verification evidence). Phase C runtime will enforce this; until then, authoring discipline.

relationship_to_source_of_truth.sot_says: what to trust from external systems (per SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md §3.5)
relationship_to_source_of_truth.this_ledger_says: what's wired, where credentials live, what breaks if down

update_triggers: recurring failure pattern emerges (consider promoting to Open Problems)

history.event: Phase 12 — initial creation. First domain-tier ledger authored under DEC-2026-04-29-013 envelope-aware rule. 11 active services + 2 planned + 3 not-in-use, all evidence-checked against server.py imports + .env contents + connectors.js + docs/connectors.md. Closes most of PROB-2026-04-28-009 (each optional service is now marked active/optional/planned/not-in-use with evidence). Companion files: CONNECTIONS.json, VISUALS/connections_dependency_map.mmd. Companion Communications entry: COMM-2026-04-29-009.
